title: A Creative Journey to Overcome Challenges
article_text: Last year, I had a problem with my van while I was on a long trail. I had to reverse the vehicle to get out of a trap, but my knee was in pain. I adjusted the mirror to see the curve in the road. Nowadays, I feel more confident because I overcame that awful experience. My friend posed for a photo at the agricultural festival. He was a strong competitor in the vegetable-growing contest. We drank alcohol and wrote a poem about the planet. The poem was written in a creative mode that was new to me. If only I had seen the loose extension cord, I would have avoided the fall. The wealth of the community was a mirror of their hard work.

sentences.en: Last year, I had a problem with my van while I was on a long trail.
sentences.zh: 去年，我在一条长小路上遇到了我的面包车的问题。

words.eng_def: a vehicle for carrying things or people

sentences.en: I had to reverse the vehicle to get out of a trap, but my knee was in pain.
sentences.zh: 我不得不倒车以摆脱陷阱，但我的膝盖很疼。

words.eng_def: something that catches animals or people
the joint in the middle of the leg

sentences.en: I adjusted the mirror to see the curve in the road.
sentences.zh: 我调整了镜子以便看到路上的弯道。

words.eng_def: a piece of glass that shows your face

sentences.en: Nowadays, I feel more confident because I overcame that awful experience.
sentences.zh: 如今，我更加自信，因为我克服了那次可怕的经历。

words.eng_def: sure that you can do something well
to succeed in dealing with a problem

sentences.en: My friend posed for a photo at the agricultural festival.
sentences.zh: 我的朋友在农业节上摆姿势拍照。

words.eng_def: to stay still for a picture

sentences.en: He was a strong competitor in the vegetable-growing contest.
sentences.zh: 他在蔬菜种植比赛中是一个强劲的竞争者。

words.eng_def: a person who tries to win

sentences.en: We drank alcohol and wrote a poem about the planet.
sentences.zh: 我们喝了酒，写了一首关于地球的诗。

words.eng_def: a drink that can make people drunk
a piece of writing with rhythm
a large round object in space

sentences.en: The poem was written in a creative mode that was new to me.
sentences.zh: 这首诗是以一种对我来说全新的创意模式写成的。

words.eng_def: able to make new things or ideas

sentences.en: If only I had seen the loose extension cord, I would have avoided the fall.
sentences.zh: 要是我看到了那根松动的延长线，我就能避免摔倒了。

sentences.en: The wealth of the community was a mirror of their hard work.
sentences.zh: 这个社区的财富是他们辛勤工作的反映。

words.eng_def: a large amount of money or property
something that shows what something else is like

image_prompts: A person driving a van on a long dirt trail in the countryside.
The van is reversing out of a muddy trap, and the driver is holding his knee in pain.
Close-up of a car mirror showing a curved road behind the vehicle.
A smiling person standing confidently after surviving a difficult journey.
A friend posing for a photo at a lively agricultural festival with vegetables on display.
A man holding a large vegetable, standing next to other competitors at a contest.
A group of people sitting around a table, drinking alcohol and writing a poem about Earth.
A notebook with a poem written in a new creative style, with colorful words.
A person tripping over a loose extension cord on the floor.
A wealthy community with nice houses and gardens, reflecting the hard work of the people.
